state.title: npm run build 2>&1

part.text:
Build clean (tsc + vite).

`src/main.tsx` — single component, native Canvas2D + rAF. DPR-scaled crisp canvas, full-viewport. Particles on 4 rings, hue rotates. Pointer eases field center toward cursor. Pause button gates angle advance (rAF keeps running so resume is automatic, `aria-pressed`/`aria-label`). `prefers-reduced-motion`: one static frame, redrawn only on pointermove.

Skipped: separate Orbit/Particle classes, config object, test file — add when logic branches beyond the single draw loop.
